metadata.scenario: A woman calls for the first time asking about in-home physical therapy for her elderly father. She asks about pricing and availability. The receptionist provides a quote for three visits per week. The caller sounds relieved and says she'll call back to confirm. First-time caller, prospect.

transcription.text: Thank you for calling CareFirst Home Health, this is Margaret speaking. How can I assist you today? Hi, my name is Mark Johnson. I'm looking for some information about in-home physical therapy for my elderly father. Of course, Mark. I’d be happy to help with that. What specific services are you looking for? Well, my father recently had surgery, and I think he could really benefit from physical therapy at home. That makes sense. We offer physical therapy focused on post-surgery rehabilitation. Great! Could you tell me about the pricing and availability? Sure! Our physical therapy sessions range from $110 to $140 for a 45 to 60-minute visit. How many visits would he need per week? Typically, we recommend three visits per week for optimal recovery. So that would be around how much? For three sessions a week, it would be approximately $330 to $420 each week, depending on the specific services provided. That sounds reasonable. Do you have availability for next week? Yes, we have openings starting Monday. Would that work for you? Yes, that should be fine. I'll need to talk to my father about it first. Absolutely, take your time. You can call back to confirm once you've discussed it. Will do. Also, I might be interested in some help with medication management for him. We do offer medication management as well, priced at $65 to $80 per session. That’s good to know. I’ll think about that too. Fantastic! Just let us know if you’d like to add that service when you call back. I appreciate all the information, Margaret. Thank you so much for your help! You’re very welcome, Mark. I look forward to hearing from you soon! Yes, I’ll call back to confirm. Have a great day! You too, take care!
